name: morning-ai
description: AI news tracking system. Tracks 80+ AI entities across 8 data sources and generates daily structured reports.

interface.shortDescription: Track 80+ AI entities across 8 sources with daily scored reports
interface.longDescription: Daily-scheduled AI news tracker. Collects updates from 80+ AI entities across X, Reddit, HN, GitHub, HuggingFace, arXiv, YouTube, and Discord. Generates scored, deduplicated Markdown reports with optional cover infographics.
interface.defaultPrompt: Track today's AI news and generate a scored daily report
